title: SA record for KPS learner
description: KNYSNA NEWS - Requelme Juicy, a Grade 7...
bodyText: [{"type":"paragraph","text":"KNYSNA NEWS - Requelme Juicy, a Grade 7 learner at Knysna Primary School, has etched his name into South African athletics history by breaking the national high jump record for boys u.13.","html":"KNYSNA NEWS - Requelme Juicy, a Grade 7 learner at Knysna Primary School, has etched his name into South African athletics history by breaking the national high jump record for boys u.13."},{"type":"blockquote","text":"Competing at the recent SA Schools Athletics Championships, he soared to an impressive height of 1.75m, surpassing the previous record of 1.74m."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"The young athlete, who is also an avid rugby and cricket player, said he was introduced to high jump in Grade 3 when a friend encouraged him to try it out.","html":"The young athlete, who is also an avid rugby and cricket player, said he was introduced to high jump in Grade 3 when a friend encouraged him to try it out."},{"type":"paragraph","text":""From there, my interest in the sport just gradually increased," said Juicy. "Once I got the knack of it, I quickly realised that, with my natural height, this could be a sport where I can really excel."","html":""From there, my interest in the sport just gradually increased," said Juicy. "Once I got the knack of it, I quickly realised that, with my natural height, this could be a sport where I can really excel.""},{"type":"paragraph","text":"After being placed only 14th at the nationals in Grade 6, he returned with renewed focus, working closely with his coaches, Radian Williams and Evelyn White, on his technique, conditioning and mental preparation.","html":"After being placed only 14th at the nationals in Grade 6, he returned with renewed focus, working closely with his coaches, Radian Williams and Evelyn White, on his technique, conditioning and mental preparation."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Preparation","html":"Preparation"},{"type":"paragraph","text":""At that meeting, the competition was tough," he recalled. "But I knew I had much more in the tank than my performance showed."","html":""At that meeting, the competition was tough," he recalled. "But I knew I had much more in the tank than my performance showed.""},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Focus ...","html":"Focus ..."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"His preparation paid off in a big way at this year's SA event.","html":"His preparation paid off in a big way at this year's SA event."},{"type":"blockquote","text":""I felt in great shape and had a hunch that if I performed to my ability, I would come very close to the record or even break it. And that's exactly what happened.""},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Interestingly, two other high jumpers also managed to clear 1.75m at the event.","html":"Interestingly, two other high jumpers also managed to clear 1.75m at the event."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"However, Juicy clinched the title as he was the only one to clear the height on his first attempt without any misses.","html":"However, Juicy clinched the title as he was the only one to clear the height on his first attempt without any misses."},{"type":"blockquote","text":"Looking ahead, his immediate goal is to attend Paul Roos Gymnasium for high school and eventually study at Stellenbosch University where he also wants to grow as a professional high jumper."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"He expressed his gratitude to his parents, Elvin and Muriel Juicy, for their support over the years, as well as to Sonia Titus, who he says is one of his biggest supporters on this journey.","html":"He expressed his gratitude to his parents, Elvin and Muriel Juicy, for their support over the years, as well as to Sonia Titus, who he says is one of his biggest supporters on this journey."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’","html":"‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’"},{"type":"paragraph","text":"For more Knysna-Plett Herald news, follow us on Facebook, X and Instagram.","html":"For more Knysna-Plett Herald news, follow us on Facebook, X and Instagram."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"You can also check out our videos on our YouTube channel or follow us on TikTok.","html":"You can also check out our videos on our YouTube channel or follow us on TikTok."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Subscribe to our WhatsApp channel and get news delivered straight to your phone.","html":"Subscribe to our WhatsApp channel and get news delivered straight to your phone."}]
